candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; matches top-line and is in the candidate list.
Not revenue; gross profit subtotal, so not appropriate.
Ancillary income, not consolidated top-line sales.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit consolidated revenue line from the candidate list. Although 'Net sales' also appears and matches numerically, candidate list already contains the correct revenue concept, so no need to go outside it.

candidates.why: Direct match to cost of goods sold / cost of sales; candidate list includes it.
Also a direct COGS synonym, but appears to duplicate 'Cost of Sales'.
M&A-related, not recurring COGS.

variables.notes: Chose 'Cost of Sales' as the primary COGS line. 'Cost of revenues/COGS' is a duplicate synonym with identical values, so excluded to avoid duplication.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D operating expense above operating income; include in XSGA when using components so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Clear SG&A component and preferred overhead bucket.
Clear SG&A component and preferred overhead bucket.
Could be overhead-related but likely broader and risks overlap with selling/administrative/R&D.
Would be a valid SG&A component if populated separately, but preview suggests no standalone values.
Capitalized amount is not the expense line itself and should not be used as SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit combined SG&A row exists. Selected the best operating overhead components above operating income. Included 'Research and development expenses' as required by the XSGA-XRD interaction rule so that later subtraction removes R&D. Excluded capitalized R&D, amortization, and broad 'STAFF EXPENSES' to avoid overlap/double counting.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating income; best match.
Capitalized development is not the reported R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization component, not core R&D expense.
Amortization disclosure below earnings section, not the main R&D expense line.

variables.notes: Selected the dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line. This same row is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS so XSGA minus XRD yields SG&A excluding R&D.

candidates.why: Primary recurring interest expense line.
Recurring financing cost and should be included if not already embedded in the broader interest line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Same concept as lease-liability interest, likely supplemental duplicate with opposite sign presentation; avoid duplicate counting.
Not finance cost.
Not finance cost.

variables.notes: Used the main recurring interest expense line only. Excluded lease-interest subline/supplemental line to avoid potential double counting because it likely sits within 'Interest expenses and similar charges'. Excluded broader 'Other financial income and expenses' because it includes derivatives/FX and other non-interest items.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of AB Volvo
candidates.why: Preferred owner-attributable equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interest, so less preferred for BE when a parent-equity line exists.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income - Equity holders of Parent Company
candidates.why: Income statement flow, not balance sheet equity stock.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of AB Volvo

variables.notes: Selected parent/owners' equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Exact balance sheet NCI line; preferred for MIB.
Same concept, likely duplicate synonym.
Income statement allocation of profit, not balance sheet stock of minority interest.
Income statement allocation line, not preferred for balance sheet MIB.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income attributable to Minority Interest
candidates.why: OCI flow, not balance sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: Chose the balance sheet NCI line. Excluded duplicate synonym 'Minority Interest' to avoid repeating the same concept.
